calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2015 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-26-2011 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-05-16 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Settlement on the record. (No Case File sent to D514)
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. Special appearance for the Plaintiff Capital One Bank. N.A.
Defendant Russell A. Olevsky present in pro per.

Case settled, terms read into the record and to reduce in writing as follows:
Parties stipulated for entry of Judgment.
Settlement in the amount of $10,896.00
Monthly installment of $227.00 starting on 11-30-11 and on the 30th of each month there after until fully paid.
Judgment shall not be entered unless defendant defaulted on terms of agreement, plaintiff shall give 10 days notice before an ex parte application for entry of judgment for the remaining balance.
Parties agreed to terms on the record.
Trial vacated.
Matter is set on the CRC dismissal calendar for 01-05-16 at 10am. in Dept. 610.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-13-2011 Set For Trial On Sep-26-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
